original:
As your officers perform routine approach procedures, Comms signals for your attention.

"$PlayerSirOrMadam, there's an incoming link using a Knights of Ludd signifier. A Jethro Bornanew wishes to speak with you. Just a novice, it looks like."
translated:
Tandis que vos officiers effectuent les procédures d'approche de routine, le poste Comm vous signale.

"$PlayerSirOrMadam, il y a un appel entrant d'un Chevalier de Ludd. Il dit que vous le connaissez."

option_line: BFIN_start2b:"A call from Jeff? Of course, put him through."
original: A call from Jeff? Of course, put him through.
translated: Un appel de Jeff ? Bien sûr, passez-le-moi.

original:
"Captain $playerName. I do not forget your assistance." He makes a crooked smile.

The link is poor-quality; his voice is hollowed, lacking the warmth you remember.

"I would ask, beg if I must, for your service once more."
translated:
"Capitaine $playerName. Je n'oublie pas votre aide." Il esquisse un sourire tordu.

La liaison est de mauvaise qualité ; sa voix est déformée par la compression et un délai perceptible.

original:
"What I ask, it is a part of the penance I must serve." He raises a hand, as if to stop your objections, "I do also believe it will also serve a spiritual and intrinsic good." 

"And," he clears his throat, "for your assistance, a substantial reward of credits has been authorized by the Reverend Archcurate Jaspis."

"The service..." He releases a breath. "An object considered holy by some in the mother Church has appeared in the possession of a wealthy collector."
translated: "Ce que je demande fait partie de la pénitence que je dois accomplir." Il lève la main, comme pour arrêter vos objections. "Je crois aussi sincèrement que c'est nécessaire."
